One of the advantages of this is that if someone texts you or calls you after they've signed up and says, Hey, I got to cancel for whatever reason You can call them back and read them their own words about how they weren't gonna make excuses They weren't gonna quit but they're honest and they're consistent and be like hey I'm only saying this because you made this commitment to yourself And I understand there's always a lot of things that come on like believe me like we get this That's why we've been implemented this stuff because we know that that people get scared people get whatever and I mean if we Can't get you to start then we can't help you and that's something that we really care about And it's over the phone That's how you can do it if it's be a text and they like well literally won't get on the phone with you You can just shoot them a text a contract and be like do you no longer mean this? This is no longer important to you And so you can really like and you'll get some people are like you're right I'll figure it out and then you can save those sales Which is why we do this to begin with so use it and you know leverage to your advantage
